intro: The Jeffersonian offers 14 distinct floor-plan configurations across four levels — no two quite alike. Many homes feature lofted ceilings and preserved architectural details drawn from the building's original character. The summaries below are representative; contact us for current availability, pricing, and the plan that fits you best.
note: Square footage and layouts vary by unit. At least five apartments are reserved as income-qualified homes. Availability is updated regularly — reach out to confirm.

unitTypes.name: Efficiency
unitTypes.blurb: An efficient, light-filled studio — ideal for those who want a low-maintenance home with classic schoolhouse windows.

unitTypes.name: One Bedroom
unitTypes.blurb: Comfortable one-bedroom homes with generous living space and original architectural touches in many units.

unitTypes.name: Two Bedroom
unitTypes.blurb: Spacious two-bedroom layouts — many with lofted ceilings — perfect for professionals, couples, and downsizing retirees.

unitTypes.name: Three Bedroom
unitTypes.blurb: The largest homes in the building, offering room to spread out while keeping the soul of the historic schoolhouse.

floors.summary: 5 apartments, including the building's largest three-bedroom homes.
10 apartments across a mix of layouts.
10 apartments, many with preserved windows and woodwork.
